feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP UI5 update
entry.content:
Our SAP UI5 Current version is  1.114.0

  SAPUI5 Distribution

1.114.0   (built at 16.05.2023 14:16:00)

OpenUI5 Version          1.114.0

(built at 15.05.2023 09:02:00)

How to update its , we are using SAP S4HANA 2024 on premises  with given SP level.

SAP_BASIS 758 0000 - SAP Basis Component
SAP_ABA 75I 0000 - Cross-Application Component
SAP_GWFND 758 0000 - SAP Gateway Foundation
SAP_UI 758 0000 - User Interface Technology

entry.title: Unable to Delete "Migrate Your Data" (Migration Cockpit) App Instances In Production System
entry.content:
Why it is not possible to delete migration object instances from a prod system? Sometimes also from a quality system?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Do not see option to create stories in Manage KPIs and Reports in S/4 HANA Private Cloud RISE
entry.content:
we have S/4 HANA 2023 privated cloud Rise and these systems are integrated using CORS live connectivity.

However do not see the option to create/add stories in the Manage KPIs and Reports section in S/4 HANA Fiori tiles.

Appreciate if you could let us know if we are missing steps with the connectivity/authorizations etc

Best Regards.

entry.title: How to generate a vendor role FLVN00 during synchronization employee to BP
entry.content:
Is it possible create the role FLVN00 during the BP's employee create in Public Cloud?

In S/4 Hana, it is possible create the role FLVN00 configuring the model in SM30 "PTRV_VENDOR_SYNC" and executing the program /SHCM/R_EMPL_HANDLE_BPROLES

entry.title: CDS Entity View as data source in SAP Data Services Designer
entry.content:
I am experiencing an issue with using a CDS entity view as a data source in SAP Data Services Designer. When attempting to import it from SAP S/4HANA to BODS, the CDS entity view name is not visible, unlike classic CDS views.

Note: The CDS entity view has OData.publish active, and the service is also active.

Could someone explain why the CDS entity view is not appearing and how I might resolve this issue?

entry.title: OBP: RTI integration of PIR with MPN (manufacturing Part number ) into IBP to create Transport Lane
entry.content:
Hello All,

The MPN (manufacturing part number ) is standard concept at S/4 . The team at S/4 side is maintaining the Purchasing Info Record at MPN material (M1 & M2) level not at SAP material level. The SAP material (TG12) is stock keeping unit and has the customer Sales order/forecast .

For the planning purpose in IBP , we are integrating he SAP material from S/4 to IBP. But while integrating the Purchasing Info record from S/4 to IBP , it is failing in error to create transportation Lane in IBP. The Purchasing Info record is maintain at MPN material level but not at SAP material level (TG12) .

MPN level Info record at S/4
 MPN MaterialPlantPur. OrgSupplierRef. SAP Material
Purchasing InforecordM1101010101030007TG12
Purchasing InforecordM2101010101030007TG12

Please let me know if the integration is supported in standard RTI or with BADI implemenation.

entry.title: Third party Service Delivery
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I have a customer for whom I'm implementing S/4HANA Public Cloud. For their delivery/freight, they outsource it to a third party to their customer. They also outsource installations and maintenance of their customer systems to a third party.

I tried creating service material of product type SERV with a 3rd Party SO w/o SN (CBNA) item category. However, upon creation of the sales order, an error popped up, saying that the combination of product type and the item category was invalid. 

Note: Their invoice is such that it contains both the system being sold, maintenance, logistics and installation prices which would come from the sale document.

How can this be treated on SAP S/4HANA Public cloud.

I would need your assistance in resolving this as we cannot create service materials with item category NORM (Standard item)

I await your response. Thank you

entry.title: Using SAP Companion Extended Scenario in S/4HANA
entry.content: I have configured the parameters in Fiori launchpad configuration and added both standard content workarea and my custom content sap enable now manager workarea. I am not able to see the simulations created in my custom SEN work area in the respective Fiori screens. Is it something i need to configure in my SEN Manager end? I tried adding configuration but there was no config template available for S/4HANA. The version is S4HANA ON PREMISE 2023. Any help is appreciated.

entry.title: SAP Cash Application Status (Machine Learning Status) not updated after posting
entry.content:
The SAP Cash Application Status for Items remains on value '15' even after posting on a business partner account or clearing items.

Same also for the SAP Cash Application Status for Account Determination, it remains on value '20' for instance, for a proposed customer account and it does not change to 30 or 40, even if I post to that account manually or to a different one in Reprocess Bank Statement Items app.

entry.title: service confirmation after canceling
entry.content:
Hello,All,

We use S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition.  

I cancel a service confirmation and the status of the relevant service order item is already set to Completed.(App: manage service orders)

I want to create service confirmation again, But I can't create a service confirmation .
How can I create a service confirmation in this case?

 

Ai Nishida

entry.title: Tax condition type in business partner
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

On S/4 HANA, We have created new tax condition type & assigned to one country. When we open BP with role - FLCU01 in display mode initially tax condition type field in "Billing" tab is blank once we switch to change mode we get message " New output tax rate get adjusted" and we see new Tax condition type.

My question is for existing BP how to get it done in MASS? we cant go in each and every BP change mode.

We tried it through LSMW but nut it didn't worked.

please guide us if anyone experienced this.

Thank you

entry.title: Challenge with SAP Event Mesh: Status Code 200 in Postman and ABAP, but 503 in Event Mesh
entry.content:
Problem Statement:

In our current architecture, we use SAP Event Mesh to transmit messages to SAP IS-U (R3). The process involves an SAP Event Mesh webhook calling a SICF service under the path /sap/event_mesh_api/ via the URL /sap/event_mesh_api/events?sap-client=XXX within our IS-U environment. However, in tests with Postman and an ABAP report, we get different results: 

Test with Postman and ABAP Report: 

When testing the target URL /sap/event_mesh_api/events?sap-client=XXX using Postman or an ABAP report, we receive an HTTP status code 200, indicating a successful connection and response. 

 

Test with SAP Event Mesh Webhook: 

However, when the Event Mesh webhook calls the same URL, an HTTP status code 503 is logged in Event Mesh. This suggests that the target URL is either unreachable or there is a failure in server-side processing. 

 

Monitoring and Troubleshooting: 

No messages are displayed in Cloud Connector Monitoring. This could mean that the message either never reaches the Cloud Connector or that an error in processing prevents the message from being correctly logged. 

 

Internal Test Service: 

To further test the functionality of Event Mesh, we connected an internal test service. When triggering the service through the webhook, we observed that the messages were successfully delivered via Event Mesh to the service. This confirms that the basic configuration of Event Mesh is working. 

 

Issue with the Cloud Connector: 

However, a problem arises when the Cloud Connector is involved in the communication. The messages that are supposed to be sent via the Event Mesh webhook to the IS-U environment do not reach the Cloud Connector. We suspect that the issue lies within the Cloud Connector configuration, but we have not yet identified the exact cause. 

 

Contact with SAP Support: 

SAP Support was unable to reproduce the problem in their environment; the connection worked flawlessly on their side. 

Question to the Community: We are facing the challenge that the Event Mesh webhook does not provide the same response as the tests in Postman or ABAP. Instead, it returns a status code 503, indicating a service failure. 

Has anyone in the community experienced similar issues with SAP Event Mesh? If so, what steps or solutions were helpful in troubleshooting? 

Some specific questions where we need assistance: 

Different Status Codes: Why might the Event Mesh webhook return a status code 503, while direct tests with Postman or ABAP return a status code 200? 

 

Monitoring Issue: Why do the messages not appear in Cloud Connector Monitoring? Are there specific settings or logs that could provide more insight into the cause of the problem? 

 

Cloud Connector Issue: Has anyone experienced similar issues related to Cloud Connector configuration? What specific points should we check? 

 

Additional Tests or Configurations: What other tests or configuration changes could be helpful in identifying the root cause of the problem? 

We look forward to your experiences, tips, and solutions to help resolve this issue. 

Thank you in advance for your support! 

Attachment: Following this post, you will find screenshots documenting the issues described, configuration and our previous tests. 

 

 

 

 

 

 


#SAPEventMesh #SAPBTP #CloudConnector #SAPIntegration #ISU #ABAP #SAPTechWebhooks #SAPSupport #SAPArchitectur

entry.title: Exportação dos dados fiscais S/4 Hana Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Olá comunidade, por favor, é possível fazer (e como) a exportação dos dados fiscais necessários para SPED e demais obrigações fiscais, quando o cliente tem S/4HC Public e motor de cálculo Avalara, para que um escritório contábil realize os demonstrativos para o Governo? Obrigado!

entry.title: Upgrade S/4 1909 to 2023 with Disaster recovery online replication
entry.content:
Hi, 

We are upgrading a S4 Hana from 1909 to 2023, and nowadays the PRD environment has a online replication of the DB to a Disaster Recovery in another location. 

Is it necessary to disconnect online replication until the end of the shadow write instance to the database or can online replication be kept connected during the entire upgrade? If disconnection is recommended, I would appreciate the reasons and ideally documentation on the matter.

Thank you very much in advance.

entry.title: Automatic Batch in MIGO Good receipt for a specific material type
entry.content:
Dear Expert, 

I have a requerement to generate a batch automatically in MIGO for a specific material Type ZEM2 (for other material Type, No need to generate as we will use the supplier batch)
Is there any way to do that in SAP S/4HANA

I tried to 

1- Activate the batch generation in 

SAP Customizing Implementation Guide -> Logistics - General -> Batch Management -> Batch Number Assignment -> Activate Internal Batch Number Assignment ----> Activate Batch Number Assignment (Actif)

2- SAP Customizing Implementation Guide -> Logistics - General -> Batch Management -> Creation of New Batches -> Define Initial Creation for Batch Master Maintenance    and choose "C : Automatic no manuel creation" 

When I tried that, in MIGO Good receipt, the batch is generated for all of the material types and not only the ZEM2

Could you please help me with this issue

Thank you

entry.title: Display RFQ and PR Associated to outline agreement (Contract) in PO Screen
entry.content:
Dear SAP expert, 

I've created an RFQ in reference of PR, then a contract (ME31K) in reference of RFQ, then created a PO in refernce of the contract

PR > RFQ > Contract > PO

in PO screen (ME21N) I only have the contract number,  the PR and RFQ number is not displayed, 

Is there any way to display the RFQ associated to contract and to PR associated to RFQ In the PO screen ?

if not possible in stadard, where can I find in the RFQ screen the PR number associated to it 

and in contact screen  the RFQ created from it 

Could you please help me

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Migration Projects twice
entry.content:
Dear Experts

Good day.

I upload customer data using staging tables successfully.

If I can upload vender data into same BP number ? 

thanks~

entry.title: Adjust new Allowance Plan to Existing Allowances/ Provider Contracts
entry.content:
Hello,

We have created a second Allowance Plan, since we had to modify the Allowance Interface and thus the Allowance Plan in order to gather the new parameters. Most of the existing Provider Contracts have allowances created and mapped to Allowance Plan V1. New Provider Contracts that create new Allowances are directly allocated to V2, but we also need a way to change the Allowance Plan Version for existing allowances of our customers. We are using SAP CC 2023 FPS0.

Is there any way to do that?

Thank you in advance,
Xhoi Alickolli

entry.title: Issue in standard T code QA32 while result recording.
entry.content:
Dear support executive in result recording user add comment of result in inspection description in that 1st line is editable but other line are non editable. issue is how to do other line editable. 

for more detail please find attached file.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to Remove or hide time from a picker in F4 value from Custom CDS based fiori app
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to remove time from picker in the value help for field CREATED ON in CDS -RAP  based custom Fiori app. Please let me know how to achieve this. Attaching screenshot for reference.

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model  SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA ABAP Extensibility

SAP Fiori Makers
